final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for a domestic Chinese fundraising roadshow presentation cover, featuring GPT-5.5 launch announcement with speaker Sam Altman.

Style/medium: clean corporate PPT cover design, Chinese tech startup aesthetic, professional investor deck style
Subject: bold headline "GPT 5.5 发布" as central focal point, speaker name "奥特曼" positioned below as keynote presenter, modern tech brand feel
Composition: centered layout with generous top margin for projector safe zone, headline dominates upper half, speaker credit in lower third
Scene/backdrop: abstract gradient or subtle geometric pattern suggesting AI/neural networks, minimal to avoid distraction
Color palette: professional blue or tech-forward gradient (deep blue to electric blue) with white text, or red/gold accent for Chinese market gravitas
Text (verbatim): "GPT 5.5 发布", "奥特曼"
Constraints: must work as 16:9 presentation slide cover; text must remain legible when projected; design must appeal to Chinese GP/VC investors
Avoid: cluttered layout; cartoonish AI imagery; Western stock photos; excessive decoration; generic startup clichés (rocket ships, lightbulbs)
